content.text:
Based on the clear visualization of the molecule with atom indices labeled, I can definitively identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 18 (N):

Atom N:18 is covalently connected to:
- C:21 (carbon) - bonded directly
- N:17 (nitrogen) - bonded directly  
- C:19 (carbon) - bonded directly

These three atoms are the only ones directly bonded to nitrogen atom 18.

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 2492, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_2492.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 18 (N) are:
- Atom 21: C
- Atom 17: N  
- Atom 19: C

Geomconf_index: 2492

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 18, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
